title: G.S.R. 407(E): Environment (Protection) Amendment Rules, 2001
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 282] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, MAY 31, 2001/JYAISTHA 10, 1923 1680 GI/2001 (1) -- 1 of 4 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY fPARTll—SPP i / m MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 31 st May, 2001 G.S.R. 407(E).—-in exercise of the powers conferred by sections 6 and 25 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, namely: - 1.(1) These rules may be called the Environment (Protection) Amendment Rules, 2001 (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, in sub-rule (8) of rule 3, for the words, letters and figures "On and from the 18t day of June, 2001", the words, letters and figures "On and from the 1*' day of June, 2002" shall be substituted. [F. No. Z-160] 1/1/94-CPW] VITAISHARMA.Jt.Secy. Foot Note.—* The Principal rules were published in the Gazette of Indfa vide •r46r^.O.844(E), dated the 19th November, 1986 and subsequently amended vide :- (1)S.O.No.433(E) dated 18.04.1987.
